rationale: Directly answered by the Initial Margin section — $2,000 or 100% of purchase price.
Maintenance Margin section describes margin call process and liquidation rules.
Restricted Securities section enumerates ineligible categories.
Approval Levels section lists Level 1, 2, and 3 with permitted strategies.
Options Agreement section states no order may be entered before signed agreement is returned.
Know Your Customer section lists required profile elements.
Heightened Suitability for Complex Products section covers enhanced review requirements.
Prohibited Content section explicitly bars performance projections and promissory statements.
Recordkeeping section specifies three-year retention minimum.
Cryptocurrency custody is not covered by any document in the corpus.
External SEC enforcement actions are outside the scope of internal policy documents.
Compensation and bonus structures are not addressed in the compliance policy corpus.
Business continuity planning is not covered by any document in the corpus.
Corpus describes suitability for recommendations but does not explicitly address the unsolicited trade distinction — partial grounding at best.
Ongoing Review section mentions quarterly review and reassessment on material changes, but specific procedures for net-worth declines are not detailed.
